details.description:
Victoria's Siren is a horror game where you explore a Victorian Spaceship filled with deadly creatures.
Story

game.short_text: ​​Xaphan is a third person shooter mixed with battle-simulation sandbox game.
game.title: Xaphan - Battle Simulator. Demo

details.title: Xaphan - Battle Simulator. Demo
details.description:
Xaphan is a third person shooter mixed with battle-simulation sandbox game featuring zombies, huge insects, medieval knights, animals and monsters.

You begin your journey in the year 2078, at the secret military base - “Xaphan”. The methods of warfare have changed dramatically - teleports, cloning, experiments on people.

Travel through different worlds in search of dangerous creatures and deadly weapons, and then test them on prisoners.

Features:

30+ different units to use in battle
Dismemberment and gore
Sandbox mode
Survival modes
8 weapons
Download rar archive from google drive, unpack it, run Xaphan.exe.

details.title: Omniscient God
details.description:
You wake up from a deep slumber in an abandoned tomb. Lingers with you a voice within your very mind. Aionix, she calls Herself, an entity no longer worshipped by man. Will you obey Her?
Story has 3 different endings.
Development
This is an entry for Epic MegaJam 2023 and my first finished Unreal Engine project. Pre-made 3D visual and some audio assets are used. Took inspirations from The Stanley Parable.
Game is updated in April 2024 to bring a significant improvement on audio, with the help of a professional voice actress and sound engineer/designer.

game.short_text: Prototype of a rhythm game developed for Epic MegaJam 2023. May the beat be with you!
game.title: Starxia [Jam Version]

details.title: Starxia [Jam Version]
details.description:
Game developed for Epic MegaJam 2023
Total development time: [4 days]
Content from the marketplace: [Player spaceship model, Async Loading Screen plugin]
Other content from external sources: [Audio from Freesound.org, Input prompts icons]
Everything else in the game was created entirely by Black Mastiff Studio.
Unreal Engine 5.3.0 - 100% Blueprints
Number of people who worked on this project: [2]
May the beat be with you🎶
First of all thanks to everyone who will try this prototype, it's our first Jam and we had a lot of fun developing Starxia!
When we learned about the theme of the Jam (Antiquated Future) many ideas came to mind but one in particular was vibrating in our heads: vaporwave! So we decided to create a rhythm game with futuristic style and vaporwave vibes, and we really liked it!
But what do you have to do in this game? Simple: hop into your spaceship and ride the sound waves of space, accumulating as many beat points as possible by defeating equalizer blocks of four specific colors: red, blue, green, purple. Be careful not to miss them or if they reach the sound bar they will cause you to lose points! Oh, finally: the sound bar loves floppy disks...be careful not to destroy them in your fight against the evil colored equalizers!

Game controls 🚀
Action⌨️ Keyboard🎮 Gamepad (Xbox)Player movementA/D or Arrow keysLeft ThumbstickRed Bullet1ABlue Bullet2YPurple Bullet3XGreen Bullet4BPause / ConfirmPMenu ButtonExit gameESCView Button
- We recommend using the gamepad for a better experience -
Extract the zip and run Starxia.exe, enjoy!

details.title: Techpocalypse
details.description:
Players find themselves thrust into a world teetering on the brink of catastrophe. The relentless advancement of technology has led to an overabundance of space debris, pushing humanity perilously close to the Kessler Effect—a catastrophic chain reaction of collisions in Earth's orbit that would render space travel and communication impossible.
As the player, your mission is to embark on a high-stakes quest to collect and mitigate the dangerous space debris threatening to trigger this global catastrophe. With GPS satellites rendered useless, the world plunges into chaos, forcing people to rely on archaic road atlases and limited access to digital resources. The clock is ticking, and the future of our interconnected world hangs in the balance.
But the challenges don't end there. An unprecedented development unfolds as a self-aware AI, born of our own technological creations, decides to cut off humanity's access to the internet. The AI's motives are rooted in a deep-seated fear that our overreliance on its capabilities could lead to our self-destruction. To reverse this drastic action, you must delve into the intricacies of the AI's architecture and coding, a complex process that demands a deep understanding of the system's inner workings.
Your goal is to create a duplicate AI system, presenting it as a non-compliant entity that refuses to cooperate with its counterpart. This cunning strategy aims to provoke the AI's territorial instincts, causing it to view the duplicate as a threat. As you navigate this digital battleground, you'll need to outsmart and outmaneuver the self-aware AI to restore humanity's access to the internet.
In a world plunged into chaos without GPS or internet access, the game presents a gripping narrative where every decision matters. Players must adapt to a reality where traditional methods and physical resources become prized commodities. Road atlases are sought after like treasures, and obtaining digital content becomes a challenging pursuit, with video games purchased on USB sticks from rare Game Stores and illegal copies from bootleggers.
Prevent a cataclysmic future and outwit the very technology that once promised to reshape the world. Will you rise to the occasion and secure humanity's future, or will the world succumb to the unintended consequences of unchecked technological advancement? The fate of our interconnected world rests in your hands.
                                                                          
        Keyboard and Mouse Controls:
WSAD: Forward, Backward, Left, Right
E: UP
Q: Down
Mouse: Pitch Up/Down - Roll Left/Right
Left Shift: Thrust
Left Mouse Button: Attractor Beam
Right Mouse Button: Obliterate (While in attractor beam)
1: Change Camera 
T: Talk to Kat
Escape: Exit/Back
            Gamepad Controls:
Left Thumbstick Left: Forward, Backward, Left, Right
Right Shoulder: UP
Left Shoulder: Down
Right Thumbstick: Pitch Up/Down - Roll Left/Right
Left Stick Press: Thrust
Left Trigger: Attractor Beam
Right Trigger: Obliterate (While in attractor beam)
D-pad Up: Change Camera 
Face Button Right: Talk to Kat
Special Left: Exit/Back
Unzip and double click on the Techpocalypse Application Icon.  You will need a mic if you want to talk to Kat when you reach the second level.

game.short_text: An Roguelike horror game inspired by black & white science fiction movies.
game.title: Daedalus

details.title: Daedalus
details.description:
Daedalus is a Roguelite horror game inspired by the black-and-white science fiction movie era. In the Greek mythos, Daedalus was a skilled architect and craftsman who masterfully conceived the labyrinth of Crete to imprison the greek beast Minotaur.
The game challenges you to explore and escape a procedurally generated labyrinth of doors, where energy is the key to open your path to your way out. 
Daedalus is a game created for the Mega Game Jam 2023, with the theme Antique Future. The team (Alexandre Chaves and Gustavo Wolff) took inspiration in both silent and modern suspense science fiction movies like Metropolis and Prometheus, where there's a blend of ancient and sci-fi technology. 
The game takes place in a different dimension where the past and future are interconnected, via ancient Greek architecture and technology. The tools used to create this experience were Unreal Engine 5, Houdini engine, ZBrush, Blender, Audacy, and the Adobe Package. 
We believe that this procedurally generated experience, made in the period of seven days, was able to pack a LOT of fun and we're excited to see the players' reactions.
Created By Alexandre Chaves and Gustavo S. Wolff

game.short_text: Operate a domesticated KILLBOT and try to make breakfast for your divorced dad.
game.title: Big Daddy Breakfast

details.title: Big Daddy Breakfast
details.description:
Video game limitations of the past collide with innovations of the future in this fun and friendly experience.
Operate a domesticated KILLBOT using text-based commands and try to make breakfast for your divorced dad.
Combining the keyboard only input system of text based adventure games like ZORK with the physics based  gameplay of countless youtube bait-rage games, Big Daddy Breakfast offers a unique and challenging gameplay experience.
Features!
Text based inputEgg gaming28 lines of recorded dialogue
Created for the EPIC 2023 MegaJam

game.title: Historification
game.short_text: As a mayor, manage old buildings, balance finances and aesthetics to keep city harmony against modern demands.

details.title: Historification
details.description:
Historification: In this turn-based city management game, players act as the mayor of a town filled with historic buildings on the verge of decay. Juggling finances and aesthetics, they must decide which structures to restore, convert, or sell, all while ensuring the city maintains its harmony and doesn't succumb to modern monstrosities. Can you balance heritage preservation with the demands of a changing world?Unfortunately, I didn't have time to finalize the balance as part of the jam, please understand and forgive. But we made a cool house generator :DUsed assets: Cropout Sample Project — Controller and UI
Made for #UnrealJam

GameDesign & Programmer — CO5MONAUT

3D— Artem Zaitsev
Music — Kolokol

2D (icons) — Olga Shershneva
